constraints.message: Overall double-window width must remain large enough for two single units and the joining mullion
Each single-window unit must remain wide enough for frame, sash, and glazing
Overall window height must remain above the minimum family size
Wall thickness must exceed frame depth

glazing_options.notes: single glazing is retained for heritage/interior use; efficient exterior defaults should be double or triple IGU with low-e coating and gas fill when available

terminology.muntin: physical strip dividing or simulating division of lites
terminology.tdl: separate glass pieces divided by muntins
terminology.sdl: single glass unit with applied bars

wall_installation.default_strategy: align frame near the wall thermal plane with continuous air/water control layers and drained sill support
host_requirements: rough opening sized with shim gap
insulation overlap to reduce frame thermal bridge

architectural.assembly_rule: Two European single-window units coupled side by side with a central joining mullion; each unit retains its own frame, sash, glazing, divided-lite, and wall-installation parameters.

constraints.message: Overall window width must remain large enough for frame, mullion, and both sashes
Overall window height must remain above the minimum family size
Wall thickness must exceed frame depth
Left glazing width must remain positive
Right glazing width must remain positive

glazing_options.notes: single glazing is retained for heritage/interior use; efficient exterior defaults should be double or triple IGU with low-e coating and gas fill when available

terminology.muntin: physical strip dividing or simulating division of lites
terminology.tdl: separate glass pieces divided by muntins
terminology.sdl: single glass unit with applied bars

wall_installation.default_strategy: align frame near the wall thermal plane with continuous air/water control layers and drained sill support
host_requirements: rough opening sized with shim gap
insulation overlap to reduce frame thermal bridge
